name: markpad-cross-platform-export-reload-toolbar
title: Markpad cross-platform export, reload, and toolbar
original_prompt: Implement hardened cross-platform plan for HTML export images/frontmatter/links, reload/open behavior, and editor toolbar.

entries.note: Started execution from the hardened cross-platform plan. Scope: detached HTML export with embedded local images/static frontmatter/link rewriting, manual reload/open hotkeys, and editor toolbar.

Added failing regression tests for export helpers, reload/open/toolbar source wiring, and Rust data URL helpers. Node tests fail as expected because exportHtml helpers and integrations are not implemented yet. cargo test is blocked before local tests by missing pkg-config/OpenSSL in WSL.

Implemented detached HTML export helpers and export flow, read_file_as_data_url Rust command, manual Reload from Disk with F5/menu/titlebar wiring, preview Ctrl/Cmd+O handling, and editor toolbar delegated to Monaco actions.

Verification completed. Node regression suite and Svelte typecheck pass. Linux cargo test remains blocked by missing pkg-config/OpenSSL, but Windows x64 no-bundle cross-build with cargo-xwin succeeds and release/windows standalone exe plus SHA256SUMS were updated.

verification.command: npx -y tsx --test scripts/exportHtml.test.ts scripts/reloadOpenToolbar.test.ts; cargo test export_data_url --lib
verification.outcome: npx -y tsx --test scripts/exportHtml.test.ts scripts/reloadOpenToolbar.test.ts failed red; cargo test export_data_url --lib blocked by openssl-sys/pkg-config

verification.command: npx -y tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts; npm run check; cargo test export_data_url --lib; npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle; sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt
verification.outcome: npx -y tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts passed 34/34; npm run check found 0 errors and 14 existing warnings; cargo test export_data_url --lib blocked by openssl-sys/pkg-config; npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle succeeded; sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt OK

final_result: Implemented and verified with noted Linux cargo-test environment blocker.
